mapper.select: SELECT MEM_ID , MEM_NAME , MEM_ROLE FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} AND MEM_PW = #{memPw}

SELECT SHOP_MEMBER.MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, JOIN_DATE, MEM_EMAIL , IFNULL( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_NUM) = 0 THEN '구매 내역 없음' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_NUM) = 1 THEN (SELECT ITEM_NAME FROM item WHERE item.ITEM_NUM = MAX(SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM)) ELSE CONCAT( (SELECT ITEM_NAME FROM item WHERE item.ITEM_NUM = MAX(SHOP_BUY.ITEM_NUM)), ' 외 ', COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_NUM) - 1, '건' ) END, '구매 내역 없음' ) AS PURCHASE FROM shop_member LEFT OUTER JOIN SHOP_BUY ON SHOP_MEMBER.MEM_ID = SHOP_BUY.MEM_ID GROUP BY SHOP_MEMBER.MEM_ID, MEM_NAME, JOIN_DATE, MEM_EMAIL ORDER BY JOIN_DATE DESC
SELECT MEM_ID , MEM_PW , MEM_NAME , MEM_TEL , MEM_EMAIL , MEM_ADDR , ADDR_DETAIL FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ID = #{MEM_ID}
